title: Bounded AI delegated post-guidance control realignment refresh execution
objective: Execute the next delegated dual-lane packet after Packet 843 publication by reusing the unchanged authoritative-host helper surface for a fresh admitted-trio live evidence tuple while aligning the active execution plan, workspace authority framework, and Codex scaffold brief to the published delegated Packet 831 through Packet 843 governance stack and current next-step posture under explicit coordinator ownership.
execution_gate: Ready after Packet 843 publication and authoritative-host parity restoration on 2026-05-14.
publication_note: Lane A and Lane B validated cleanly, the Packet 844 closeout set was published, and authoritative-host parity was restored using only the bounded generated-artifact blocker remediation declared in this packet.
constraints: Keep Lane A limited to the admitted apex-fs, apex-db, and apex-jobs trio plus the repo-visible Packet 844 artifact tuple.
Keep Lane B limited to the active execution plan, workspace authority framework, and Codex scaffold brief.
Do not widen controller scope, service admission, auth, ingress, runtime posture, or business logic.
context: Packet 830 remains the helper-bootstrap-toolchains-python3-path floor, Packet 831 remains the delegated split-governance floor, Packet 832 remains the delegated operator prompt template floor, Packet 833 remains the delegated coordinator closeout template floor, Packet 834 remains the delegated packet-definition template floor, Packet 835 remains the higher-level orchestration entry-surface alignment floor, Packet 836 remains the active plan and authority control-surface alignment floor, Packet 837 remains the live guidance-refresh floor, Packet 838 remains the post-guidance control-surface refresh floor, Packet 839 remains the higher-level guidance refresh floor, Packet 840 remains the post-guidance control refresh floor, Packet 841 remains the higher-level guidance realignment floor, Packet 842 remains the post-guidance control realignment refresh floor, and Packet 843 remains the higher-level guidance realignment refresh floor.

The current recommendation in PROJECT_STATUS.md is another delegated packet reusing the Packet 831 through Packet 834 stack with a new disjoint lane objective while preserving the Packet 843, Packet 842, Packet 837, Packet 835, and Packet 836 aligned surfaces.

The active execution plan, workspace authority framework, and Codex scaffold brief still stop below the new Packet 843 higher-level guidance floor in their current proof-floor and next-step wording, so this packet refreshes those remaining control surfaces without reopening helper or controller scope.

lanes.name: authoritative-host evidence lane
scope: run the focused helper truthfulness pytest slice
publish only the Packet 844 artifact tuple emitted by the unchanged helper

lanes.name: post-guidance control realignment refresh lane
scope: align the active execution plan to the published delegated Packet 831 through Packet 843 governance stack and current next-step posture
align the workspace authority framework current proof floor so it preserves Packet 842 and Packet 843 explicitly
align the Codex scaffold brief so its preserved alignment note and done definition reflect the Packet 843-aligned higher-level guidance posture and Packet 842-aligned control posture
validation: Required-anchor scan for Implementation note, Packet 843, Packet 842, Packet 841, Packet 837, Packet 836, Packet 835, Current Recommended Next Steps, Current proof floor, Current Alignment Note, and Done Definition

expected_outcome: One fresh Packet 844 admitted-trio live evidence tuple emitted through tools/ai/run_authoritative_host_packet.py under tests/canary/host-bootstrap-status/actual and tests/canary/mcp-contract/actual

The active execution plan, workspace authority framework, and Codex scaffold brief all preserve the Packet 843-aligned higher-level guidance posture and the Packet 842-aligned post-guidance control posture truthfully
One coordinator-owned closeout handoff for Packet 844 plus shared status-surface updates only after both lane validations and host parity restoration succeed
abort_rule: If either lane needs a file outside its declared set, if the helper requires mutation, if the focused pytest slice fails, if the live helper result is not PASS, or if the control realignment refresh cannot be validated through the declared anchors, stop both lanes and close the packet as ABORTED.
